title: FA Classic Horses Netherite Horse Armor Fix
description: Do you prefer FreshLX's classic horse texture but you also want to use netherite horse armor? This resource pack fixes that so you can!
body:
Fresh Animations is a massive resource pack with many extensions and addons by FreshLX. Some features aren't completely up to date due to it's immense size, which is why I made this resource pack to allow players like me that enjoy FA + Classic Horses to properly enjoy this mod with netherite horse armor.

![Netherite Horse Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92f20ac0d0f9652f713fcb0b643f5ffdc9b58955_0.webp)

See More:

[Classic Horses](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-classic-horses)
